# Personal Mac Automation Scripts

> A small personal automation repo for macOS. The `MacShortcuts` directory stores assets used by the Shortcuts app on Mac, while Hammerspoon configuration and Lua modules live under `.hammerspoon`.

Use this repository with the following structure in mind:

- `MacShortcuts` is for Apple Shortcuts-related scripts and supporting assets, such as shell scripts and images used by macOS Shortcuts workflows.
- `.hammerspoon` is for Hammerspoon configuration. Reusable Lua modules are stored in `.hammerspoon/modules`.
- Do not assume files in `MacShortcuts` are Hammerspoon modules, and do not assume Hammerspoon Lua files belong in `MacShortcuts`.
- The `LICENSE` file applies at the repository root.

## Repo Files

- [LICENSE](./LICENSE): Repository license.

## Mac Shortcuts

- [CreateNewTextFile.sh](./MacShortcuts/CreateNewTextFile.sh): Shell script intended for use from the Shortcuts app on Mac.
- [CreateNewTextFile.png](./MacShortcuts/CreateNewTextFile.png): Supporting image asset for the Shortcuts workflow.

## Hammerspoon

- [init.lua](./.hammerspoon/init.lua): Main Hammerspoon entry point.
- [auto-reload-config.lua](./.hammerspoon/modules/auto-reload-config.lua): Hammerspoon module for automatically reloading config changes.
- [copy-selected-file-folder.lua](./.hammerspoon/modules/copy-selected-file-folder.lua): Hammerspoon module that binds `option-command-p` to copy the selected Finder file or folder path.
- [screenshot-to-preview.lua](./.hammerspoon/modules/screenshot-to-preview.lua): Hammerspoon module related to screenshot handling and Preview.
